name: xmi-generator
description: Create XMI files straight outta VSCode

scripts.install-python: python3 -m pip install xmi-reader==1.0.3 --target ./python/lib --upgrade -q && node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('python3 -m pip install python-magic-bin==0.4.14 --target ./python/lib --upgrade -q',{stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){}" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='./python/lib/prettytable/prettytable.py',c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');fs.writeFileSync(p,c.replace('Literal[\"cap\", \"title\", \"upper\", \"lower\"] | None','Literal[\"cap\", \"title\", \"upper\", \"lower\", None]'));"
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run install-python && npm run package
scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: pnpm run compile-tests && pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint
